response.step_by_step_log:
1. Watched the video and identified 3 distinct songs performed by Ninomae Ina'nis. 
2. Song 1 (00:06 - 01:40) identified as 'VIOLET' (Ninomae Ina'nis).
3. Song 2 (01:40 - 01:52) identified as 'KING' (Original artist: Kanaria).
4. Song 3 (01:58 - 04:59) identified as 'Ahoy!! Warera Houshou Kaizokudan☆' (Original artist: Houshou Marine).
5. Performed searches: '"VIOLET" Ninomae Ina'nis lyrics', '"KING" Kanaria Japanese and English lyrics', '"Ahoy!! Warera Houshou Kaizokudan" Houshou Marine Japanese and English lyrics'.
6. Compiled scene list with metadata and lyrics obtained from search results.
response.global_summary: A 3-song medley performance by Ninomae Ina'nis, which includes an MC interval in the middle of the set. The songs performed are 'VIOLET' (original song) and covers of 'KING' (Kanaria) and 'Ahoy!! Warera Houshou Kaizokudan☆' (Houshou Marine).

scenes.description: Introductory scene featuring stage lights and anticipation before the performance starts.
Ninomae Ina'nis begins her set with the song 'VIOLET'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Oh-oh, oh, oh-oh.
花が寝る夜、波に映った星、
うねる月が足をくすぐる。
流れる光に沿って行ってみたら、
耳に囁いた、君に届くかな。
今、手をつないでも、精一杯抱きしめても、
空は秋に満ちて。
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Oh-oh, oh, oh-oh.
The night the flowers sleep, the stars reflected on the waves,
The undulating moon tickles my feet,
If I try following the flowing light,
I whispered in your ear, will it reach you?
Now, even if we hold hands, even if I try to hug you with all my might,
The sky is filled with autumn.

scenes.description: Ninomae Ina'nis performs a cover of 'KING'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
幽閉、利口、
幽閉、ストップ、
勘弁にしといて、ダーリン。
ラララブウ、ラッタッタ。
あなたはKING。
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Locking up the clever one before they die,
You, hey, you know that it's a pain to get you to be obedient, darling.
Don't lock me up!
You are king.

scenes.description: Ninomae Ina'nis performs a cover of 'Ahoy!! Warera Houshou Kaizokudan☆'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
海賊なら、ヨーホー！ (Yo-Ho!)
踊って叫べ、ヨーホー！ (Yo-Ho!)
さあ、我ら宝鐘海賊団の旗の下に集え！
君たちとなら、たどり着ける、伝説のエルドラド！ (Go, Go!)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
If you're a pirate, yo-ho! (Yo-Ho!)
Dance and shout, yo-ho! (Yo-Ho!)
Now, gather under our flag!
With you, we can reach the legendary Eldorado! (Go, go!)
